name: Fudge Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate and butter together.
2. Beat the eggs, then add the sugar and a pinch of salt.
3. Add the melted chocolate mixture to the egg mixture.
4. Stir in the flour and vanilla extract.
5. Pour the batter into a greased pie pan.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 minutes.
7. Reduce the temperature to 250°F (120°C) and bake for an additional 15-20 minutes.
Note: Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature before mixing. Use a thermometer to check that the oven has reached the correct temperature.
